## Example QuestionnaireResponse: Fall 1 — QR Tumorboard Empfehlung

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): QR-Tumorboard-Fall1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[Fragebogen: Tumorboard Empfehlung](Questionnaire-senologie-tumorboard.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)tumorboard-datum
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2025-01-28
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)tumorboard-titel
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Tumorboard-Empfehlung Erika Neumann
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)tumorboard-beschreibung
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Empfehlung: Brusterhaltende Therapie mit Sentinel-LK-Biopsie, adjuvante Strahlentherapie, endokrine Therapie (Aromatasehemmer). Keine Chemotherapie aufgrund Oncotype DX RS 18.
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)empfehlung-op
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): BET links + Sentinel-LK-Biopsie
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)empfehlung-strahlentherapie
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Adjuvante Ganzbrustbestrahlung 50 Gy + Boost 10 Gy
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)empfehlung-endokrin
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Aromatasehemmer (Letrozol) für 5-10 Jahre
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)empfehlung-chemotherapie
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Keine Chemotherapie empfohlen
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "QR-Tumorboard-Fall1",
  "questionnaire" : "https://www.senologie.org/fhir/Questionnaire/senologie-tumorboard",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/Fall1-Patient-Erika-Neumann"
  },
  "authored" : "2025-01-28",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "tumorboard-datum",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueDate" : "2025-01-28"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "tumorboard-titel",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Tumorboard-Empfehlung Erika Neumann"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "tumorboard-beschreibung",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Empfehlung: Brusterhaltende Therapie mit Sentinel-LK-Biopsie, adjuvante Strahlentherapie, endokrine Therapie (Aromatasehemmer). Keine Chemotherapie aufgrund Oncotype DX RS 18."
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "empfehlung-op",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "BET links + Sentinel-LK-Biopsie"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "empfehlung-strahlentherapie",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Adjuvante Ganzbrustbestrahlung 50 Gy + Boost 10 Gy"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "empfehlung-endokrin",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Aromatasehemmer (Letrozol) für 5-10 Jahre"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "empfehlung-chemotherapie",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "Keine Chemotherapie empfohlen"
    }]
  }]
}

```
